full_text:
Xun Shu (Jihe) 荀淑 (季和)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Shu (荀淑), styledJihe (季和). Grandfather of Xun Yu. Xun Shu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
